mapper.select:
SELECT /* OrgMgmtMapper.listOrgMgmt */ OIM.ORGN_ID /* 조직 ID */ , OIM.ORGN_NM /* 조직명 */ , OIM.TYPE_CD /* 유형코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = OIM.TYPE_CD) as TYPE_NM , OIM.ORGN_LVL_CD /* 조직레벨코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0006' AND CD_VAL = OIM.ORGN_LVL_CD) as ORGN_LVL_NM , OIM.APPL_STRT_DT /* 적용시작일자 */ , OIM.APPL_CMPLT_DT /* 적용종료일자 */ , OIM.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN /* 개통여신여부 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0012' AND CD_VAL = OIM.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN) as OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_NM , OIM.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT /* 개통여신시작일자 */ , DECODE(OIM.TAXBILL_YN, 'Y','Y','N') AS TAXBILL_YN /* 세금계산서발행여부 */ , DECODE(OIM.CMSN_PRVD_YN, 'Y','Y','N') AS CMSN_PRVD_YN /* 수수료지급여부 */ , DECODE(OIM.HNDST_INVTR_YN, 'Y','Y','N') AS HNDST_INVTR_YN /* 단말재고여부 */ , OIM.BIZ_TYPE_CD /* 사업자구분 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0007' AND CD_VAL = OIM.BIZ_TYPE_CD) as BIZ_TYPE_NM , OIM.BIZ_REG_NUM /* 사업자등록번호 */ , OIM.CORP_REG_NUM /* 법인등록번호 */ , OIM.BIZ_CAT /* 업종 */ , OIM.BIZ_CON /* 업태 */ , OIM.RPRSEN_NM /* 대표자명 */ , OIM.RPRSEN_RRNUM /* 대표자주민번호 */ , OIM.TELNUM /* 전화번호 */ , OIM.FAX /* 팩스번호 */ , OIM.EMAIL /* 이메일 */ , OIM.ZIPCD /* 우편번호 */ , OIM.ADDR1 /* 주소1 */ , OIM.ADDR2 /* 주소2 */ , OIM.RESPN_PRSN_ID /* 담당자ID */ ,(SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = OIM.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as RESPN_PRSN_NM ,(SELECT TEL_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = OIM.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as RESPN_PRSN_NUM ,(SELECT MBLPHN_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = OIM.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as RESPN_PRSN_MBLPHN ,(SELECT EMAIL FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = OIM.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as RESPN_PRSN_EMAIL , OIM.HNDST_ORD_YN /* 단말주문여부 */ , OIM.ORGN_STAT_CD /* 조직상태코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0005' AND CD_VAL = OIM.ORGN_STAT_CD) as ORGN_STAT_NM , OIM.TMNT_DT /* 해지일자 */ , OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD /* 유형상세코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0004' AND CD_VAL = OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD) as TYPE_DTL_NM , OIM.HGHR_ORGN_CD /* 상위조직코드 */ ,(SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = OIM.HGHR_ORGN_CD) as HGHR_ORGN_NM /* 상위조직코드명 */ , OIM.ORGN_GRD /* 조직등급 */ , OIM.CLOSE_YN /* 정리점여부 */ , OIM.LOGIS_CNTER_YN /* 물류센터여부 */ , OIM.REG_ID /* 등록자ID */ , TO_CHAR(OIM.REG_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DTTM /*등록일시 */ , OIM.KT_ORG_ID /* KT조직ID */ , OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD1 /* 유형상세코드1 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD1 AND USG_YN = 'Y') as TYPE_DTL_CD_NM1 , OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD2 /* 유형상세코드2 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD2 AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND ETC1 IS NOT NULL) as TYPE_DTL_CD_NM2 , OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD3 /* 유형상세코드3 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD3 AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND ETC1 IS NOT NULL) as TYPE_DTL_CD_NM3 FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OIM WHERE OIM.TYPE_DTL_CD = 'Y'
AND OIM.ORGN_ID LIKE UPPER('%'||#{orgnId}||'%')
AND OIM.ORGN_NM LIKE '%'||#{orgnNm}||'%'
AND OIM.TYPE_CD = #{typeCd}
AND OIM.TYPE_CD >= 20
AND OIM.TYPE_CD >= 30
AND OIM.ORGN_LVL_CD = #{orgnLvlCd}
AND OIM.ORGN_LVL_CD >= 10
AND OIM.ORGN_LVL_CD >= 20
AND OIM.ORGN_STAT_CD = #{orgnStatCd}
START WITH ORGN_ID = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT ORGN_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE LOGIS_CNTER_YN = 'Y' and ORGN_ID = #{sessionUserOrgnId}) THEN '1' ELSE #{sessionUserOrgnId} END CONNECT BY PRIOR ORGN_ID = HGHR_ORGN_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT /* OrgMgmtMapper.insertOrgMgmt */ INTO ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST ( ORGN_ID /* 조직 ID */ , ORGN_NM /* 조직명 */ , TYPE_CD /* 유형코드 */ , ORGN_LVL_CD /* 조직레벨코드 */ , APPL_STRT_DT /* 적용시작일자 */ , APPL_CMPLT_DT /* 적용종료일자 */ , OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN /* 개통여신여부 */ , OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT /* 개통여신시작일자 */ , TAXBILL_YN /* 세금계산서발행여부 */ , CMSN_PRVD_YN /* 수수료지급여부 */ , HNDST_INVTR_YN /* 단말재고여부 */ , BIZ_TYPE_CD /* 사업자구분 */ , BIZ_REG_NUM /* 사업자등록번호 */ , CORP_REG_NUM /* 법인등록번호 */ , BIZ_CAT /* 업종 */ , BIZ_CON /* 업태 */ , RPRSEN_NM /* 대표자명 */ , RPRSEN_RRNUM /* 대표자주민번호 */ , TELNUM /* 전화번호 */ , FAX /* 팩스번호 */ , EMAIL /* 이메일 */ , ZIPCD /* 우편번호 */ , ADDR1 /* 주소1 */ , ADDR2 /* 주소2 */ , RESPN_PRSN_ID /* 담당자ID */ , REG_ID /* 등록자ID */ , REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ , HNDST_ORD_YN /* 단말주문여부 */ , ORGN_STAT_CD /* 조직상태코드 */ , TMNT_DT /* 해지일자 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD /* 유형상세코드 */ , HGHR_ORGN_CD /* 상위조직코드 */ , ORGN_GRD /* 조직등급 */ , CLOSE_YN /* 정리점여부 */ , LOGIS_CNTER_YN /* 물류센터여부 */ , KT_ORG_ID /* KT조직ID */ , TYPE_DTL_CD1 /* 유형상세코드1 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD2 /* 유형상세코드2 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD3 /* 유형상세코드3 */ , MCLUB_YN /* MCLUB대리점여부 */ ) VALUES ( #{orgnId} /* 조직 ID */ , #{orgnNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 조직명 */ , #{typeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 유형코드 */ , #{orgnLvlCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 조직레벨코드 */ , #{applStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 적용시작일자 */ , #{applCmpltDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 적용종료일자 */ , #{openCrdtLoanYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 개통여신여부 */ , #{openCrdtLoanStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 개통여신시작일자 */ , #{taxbillYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 세금계산서발행여부 */ , #{cmsnPrvdYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수수료지급여부 */ , #{hndstInvtrYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 단말재고여부 */ , #{bizTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 사업자구분 */ , #{bizRegNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 사업자등록번호 */ , #{corpRegNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 법인등록번호 */ , #{bizCat, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 업종 */ , #{bizCon, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 업태 */ , #{rprsenNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 대표자명 */ , #{rprsenRrnum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 대표자주민번호 */ , #{telnum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 전화번호 */ , #{fax, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 팩스번호 */ , #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 이메일 */ , #{zipcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 우편번호 */ , #{addr1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 주소1 */ , #{addr2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 주소2 */ , #{respnPrsnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 담당자ID */ , #{regId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 등록자ID */ , SYSDATE /* 등록일시 */ , #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , SYSDATE /* 수정일시 */ , #{hndstOrdYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 단말주문여부 */ , '1' /* 조직상태코드 */ , #{tmntDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 해지일자 */ , 'Y' /* 유형상세코드 */ , #{hghrOrgnCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상위조직코드 */ , #{orgnGrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 조직등급 */ , #{closeYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 정리점여부 */ , #{logisCnterYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 물류센터여부 */ , #{ktOrgId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* KT조직ID */ , #{typeDtlCd1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 유형상세코드1 */ , #{typeDtlCd2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 유형상세코드2 */ , #{typeDtlCd3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 유형상세코드3 */ , #{mclubYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* MCLUB대리점여부 */ )
mapper.select:
SELECT /* OrgMgmtMapper.detailOrgMgmt */ A.ORGN_ID as orgnId ,A.ORGN_NM as orgnNm /* 0 : 조직명 */ ,A.TYPE_CD as typeCd /* 1 : 유형코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = A.TYPE_CD) as typeNm ,ORGN_LVL_CD as orgnLvlCd /* 2 : 조직레벨코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0006' AND CD_VAL = A.ORGN_LVL_CD) as orgnLvlNm ,A.APPL_STRT_DT as applStrtDt /* 3 : 적용시작일자 */ ,A.APPL_CMPLT_DT as applCmpltDt /* 4 : 적용종료일자 */ ,A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN as openCrdtLoanYn /* 5 : 개통여신여부 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0012' AND CD_VAL = A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN) as OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_NM ,A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT as openCrdtLoanStrtDt /* 6 : 개통여신시작일자 */ ,A.TAXBILL_YN as taxbillYn /* 7 : 세금계산서발행여부 */ ,A.CMSN_PRVD_YN as cmsnPrvdYn /* 8 : 수수료지급여부 */ ,A.HNDST_INVTR_YN as hndstInvtrYn /* 9 : 단말재고여부 */ ,A.BIZ_TYPE_CD as bizTypeCd /* 10 : 사업자구분 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0007' AND CD_VAL = A.BIZ_TYPE_CD) as bizTypeNm ,A.BIZ_REG_NUM as bizRegNum /* 11 : 사업자등록번호 */ ,A.CORP_REG_NUM as corpRegNum /* 12 : 법인등록번호 */ ,A.BIZ_CAT as bizCat /* 13 : 업종 */ ,A.BIZ_CON as bizCon /* 14 : 업태 */ ,A.RPRSEN_NM as rprsenNm /* 15 : 대표자명 */ ,A.RPRSEN_RRNUM as rprsenRrnum /* 16 : 대표자주민번호 */ ,A.TELNUM as telnum /* 17 : 전화번호 */ ,A.FAX as fax /* 18 : 팩스번호 */ ,A.EMAIL as email /* 19 : 이메일 */ ,A.ZIPCD as zipcd /* 20 : 우편번호 */ ,A.ADDR1 as addr1 /* 21 : 주소1 */ ,A.ADDR2 as addr2 /* 22 : 주소2 */ ,A.RESPN_PRSN_ID as respnPrsnId /* 24 : 담당자ID */ ,(SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as respnPrsnNm ,(SELECT TEL_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as respnPrsnNum ,(SELECT MBLPHN_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as respnPrsnMblphn ,(SELECT EMAIL FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as respnPrsnEmail ,A.HNDST_ORD_YN as hndstOrdYn /* 32 : 단말주문여부 */ ,A.ORGN_STAT_CD as orgnStatCd /* 33 : 조직상태코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0005' AND CD_VAL = A.ORGN_STAT_CD) as orgnStatNm ,A.TYPE_DTL_CD as typeDtlCd /* 35 : 유형상세코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0004' AND CD_VAL = A.TYPE_DTL_CD) as typeDtlNm ,A.HGHR_ORGN_CD as hghrOrgnCd /* 37 : 상위조직코드 */ ,(SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.HGHR_ORGN_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) as HGHR_ORGN_NM /* 상위조직코드명 */ ,A.ORGN_GRD as orgnGrd /* 38 : 조직등급 */ ,A.CLOSE_YN as closeYn /* 39 : 정리점여부 */ ,A.KT_ORG_ID /* KT조직ID */ ,A.TYPE_DTL_CD1 /* 유형상세코드1 */ ,A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 /* 유형상세코드2 */ ,A.TYPE_DTL_CD3 /* 유형상세코드3 */ FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A WHERE 1=1
AND A.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}
SELECT /* OrgMgmtMapper.detailOrgMgmtSeq */ TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST_01.NEXTVAL, '00000000')) as tempOrgId FROM DUAL

SELECT /* OrgMgmtMapper.listOrgnHst */ A.HST_SEQ ,A.ORGN_ID ,A.ORGN_NM /* 0 : 조직명 */ ,A.TYPE_CD /* 1 : 유형코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = A.TYPE_CD) as TYPE_NM ,ORGN_LVL_CD /* 2 : 조직레벨코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0006' AND CD_VAL = A.ORGN_LVL_CD) as ORGN_LVL_NM ,A.APPL_STRT_DT /* 3 : 적용시작일자 */ ,A.APPL_CMPLT_DT /* 4 : 적용종료일자 */ ,A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN /* 5 : 개통여신여부 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0012' AND CD_VAL = A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN) as OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_NM ,A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT /* 6 : 개통여신시작일자 */ ,DECODE(A.TAXBILL_YN, 'Y','가능','불가능') AS TAXBILL_YN /* 7 : 세금계산서발행여부 */ ,DECODE(A.CMSN_PRVD_YN, 'Y','가능','불가능') AS CMSN_PRVD_YN /* 8 : 수수료지급여부 */ ,DECODE(A.HNDST_INVTR_YN, 'Y','가능','불가능') AS HNDST_INVTR_YN /* 9 : 단말재고여부 */ ,A.BIZ_TYPE_CD /* 10 : 사업자구분 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0007' AND CD_VAL = A.BIZ_TYPE_CD) as BIZ_TYPE_NM ,A.BIZ_REG_NUM /* 11 : 사업자등록번호 */ ,A.CORP_REG_NUM /* 12 : 법인등록번호 */ ,A.BIZ_CAT /* 13 : 업종 */ ,A.BIZ_CON /* 14 : 업태 */ ,A.RPRSEN_NM /* 15 : 대표자명 */ ,A.RPRSEN_RRNUM /* 16 : 대표자주민번호 */ ,A.TELNUM /* 17 : 전화번호 */ ,A.FAX /* 18 : 팩스번호 */ ,A.EMAIL /* 19 : 이메일 */ ,A.ZIPCD /* 20 : 우편번호 */ ,A.ADDR1 /* 21 : 주소1 */ ,A.ADDR2 /* 22 : 주소2 */ ,A.RESPN_PRSN_ID /* 24 : 담당자ID */ ,(SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as RESPN_PRSN_NM ,(SELECT TEL_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as RESPN_PRSN_NUM ,(SELECT MBLPHN_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as RESPN_PRSN_MBLPHN ,(SELECT EMAIL FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RESPN_PRSN_ID) as RESPN_PRSN_EMAIL ,DECODE(A.HNDST_ORD_YN, 'Y','가능','불가능') AS HNDST_ORD_YN /* 32 : 단말주문여부 */ ,A.ORGN_STAT_CD /* 33 : 조직상태코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0005' AND CD_VAL = A.ORGN_STAT_CD) as ORGN_STAT_NM ,A.TYPE_DTL_CD /* 35 : 유형상세코드 */ ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0004' AND CD_VAL = A.TYPE_DTL_CD) as TYPE_DTL_NM ,A.HGHR_ORGN_CD /* 37 : 상위조직코드 */ ,(SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.HGHR_ORGN_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) as HGHR_ORGN_NM /* 상위조직코드명 */ ,A.ORGN_GRD /* 38 : 대리점권역 */ ,FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0055', A.ORGN_GRD) AS ORGN_GRD_NM /* 38 : 대리점권역 */ ,A.CLOSE_YN /* 39 : 정리점여부 */ ,A.KT_ORG_ID /* KT조직ID */ , A.TYPE_DTL_CD1 /* 유형상세코드1 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = A.TYPE_DTL_CD1 AND ETC2 = 'Y' ) as TYPE_DTL_CD_NM1 , A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 /* 유형상세코드2 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 AND ETC2 = 'Y' ) as TYPE_DTL_CD_NM2 , A.TYPE_DTL_CD3 /* 유형상세코드3 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = A.TYPE_DTL_CD3 AND ETC2 = 'Y' ) as TYPE_DTL_CD_NM3 ,FN_GET_USRNM(A.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM ,TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RVISN_DTTM /*등록일시 */ FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_HST A WHERE A.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(A.HST_SEQ) DESC
SELECT /* OrgMgmtMapper.listCntOrgMgmtHst */ COUNT(*) FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_HST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT /* OrgMgmtMapper.listCntOrgMgmtHst */ NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER (HST_SEQ)),0)+1 AS HST_SEQ FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_HST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORG_ORGN_INFO_HST ( HST_SEQ , ORGN_ID /* 조직 ID */ , ORGN_NM /* 조직명 */ , TYPE_CD /* 유형코드 */ , ORGN_LVL_CD /* 조직레벨코드 */ , APPL_STRT_DT /* 적용시작일자 */ , APPL_CMPLT_DT /* 적용종료일자 */ , OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN /* 개통여신여부 */ , OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT /* 개통여신시작일자 */ , TAXBILL_YN /* 세금계산서발행여부 */ , CMSN_PRVD_YN /* 수수료지급여부 */ , HNDST_INVTR_YN /* 단말재고여부 */ , BIZ_TYPE_CD /* 사업자구분 */ , BIZ_REG_NUM /* 사업자등록번호 */ , CORP_REG_NUM /* 법인등록번호 */ , BIZ_CAT /* 업종 */ , BIZ_CON /* 업태 */ , RPRSEN_NM /* 대표자명 */ , RPRSEN_RRNUM /* 대표자주민번호 */ , TELNUM /* 전화번호 */ , FAX /* 팩스번호 */ , EMAIL /* 이메일 */ , ZIPCD /* 우편번호 */ , ADDR1 /* 주소1 */ , ADDR2 /* 주소2 */ , RESPN_PRSN_ID /* 담당자ID */ , REG_ID /* 등록자ID */ , REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ , HNDST_ORD_YN /* 단말주문여부 */ , ORGN_STAT_CD /* 조직상태코드 */ , TMNT_DT /* 해지일자 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD /* 유형상세코드 */ , HGHR_ORGN_CD /* 상위조직코드 */ , ORGN_GRD /* 조직등급 */ , CLOSE_YN /* 정리점여부 */ , LOGIS_CNTER_YN /* 물류센터여부 */ , KT_ORG_ID /* KT조직ID */ , TYPE_DTL_CD1 /* 유형상세코드1 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD2 /* 유형상세코드2 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD3 /* 유형상세코드3 */ , MCLUB_YN /* MCLUB대리점여부 */ ) SELECT #{orgnSeq} , ORGN_ID /* 조직 ID */ , ORGN_NM /* 조직명 */ , TYPE_CD /* 유형코드 */ , ORGN_LVL_CD /* 조직레벨코드 */ , APPL_STRT_DT /* 적용시작일자 */ , APPL_CMPLT_DT /* 적용종료일자 */ , OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN /* 개통여신여부 */ , OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT /* 개통여신시작일자 */ , TAXBILL_YN /* 세금계산서발행여부 */ , CMSN_PRVD_YN /* 수수료지급여부 */ , HNDST_INVTR_YN /* 단말재고여부 */ , BIZ_TYPE_CD /* 사업자구분 */ , BIZ_REG_NUM /* 사업자등록번호 */ , CORP_REG_NUM /* 법인등록번호 */ , BIZ_CAT /* 업종 */ , BIZ_CON /* 업태 */ , RPRSEN_NM /* 대표자명 */ , RPRSEN_RRNUM /* 대표자주민번호 */ , TELNUM /* 전화번호 */ , FAX /* 팩스번호 */ , EMAIL /* 이메일 */ , ZIPCD /* 우편번호 */ , ADDR1 /* 주소1 */ , ADDR2 /* 주소2 */ , RESPN_PRSN_ID /* 담당자ID */ , REG_ID /* 등록자ID */ , REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ , HNDST_ORD_YN /* 단말주문여부 */ , ORGN_STAT_CD /* 조직상태코드 */ , TMNT_DT /* 해지일자 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD /* 유형상세코드 */ , HGHR_ORGN_CD /* 상위조직코드 */ , ORGN_GRD /* 조직등급 */ , CLOSE_YN /* 정리점여부 */ , LOGIS_CNTER_YN /* 물류센터여부 */ , KT_ORG_ID /* KT조직ID */ , TYPE_DTL_CD1 /* 유형상세코드1 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD2 /* 유형상세코드2 */ , TYPE_DTL_CD3 /* 유형상세코드3 */ , MCLUB_YN /* MCLUB대리점여부 */ FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}
mapper.select:
SELECT B.CD_VAL as value, B.CD_DSC as text FROM CMN_GRP_MST A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0006'
AND B.CD_VAL >= 10
AND B.CD_VAL = 20
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CD_VAL) ASC

SELECT B.CD_VAL as value, B.CD_DSC as text FROM CMN_GRP_MST A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0003'
AND B.CD_VAL >= 20
AND B.CD_VAL = 30
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CD_VAL) ASC

select.if: SELECT /* OrgMgmtMapper.isExistOrgnId */ COUNT(*) FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}

mapper.select: SELECT /** OrgnRelMgmtMapper.selectValCnt */ COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ORG_VRTL_ACNT_MGMT_MST WHERE ACNT_STAT = '1' -- 정상계좌 AND CACL_DT > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}

SELECT AGENT_ID AS agentId, FN_GET_ORGNM(AGENT_ID) AS agentNm, DEPOSIT AS deposit, DEPOSIT_RATE AS depositRate, PPS35_DEPOSIT_RATE AS pps35DepositRate, DATA_RATE AS dataRate, PIN_BUY_RATE AS pinBuyRate, RENTAL_FEE AS rentalFee, VIR_ACCOUNT_ID AS virAccountId, F_GET_VAC_BANK_NAME(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID) AS virBankNm, F_GET_VAC_BANK_CODE(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID) AS virBankCd, KT_AGENCY_ID AS ktAgencyId, AGENT_DOC_FLAG AS agentDocFlag, ADMIN_ID AS adminId, RECORD_DATE AS recordDate FROM PPS_AGENT WHERE AGENT_ID = #{orgnId}
mapper.insert: /* org.orgmgmt.insertAgncyTypeHstFst */ INSERT INTO ORG_AGNCY_TYPE_HST ( ORGN_ID , APPL_END_DT , CHG_SEQ , APPL_STRT_DT , ORGN_STAT_CD , AGNCY_TYPE_CD , AGNCY_TYPE_DTL_CD , CHNL_DTL_CD , MVNO_ORGN_YN , OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN , CMSN_PRVD_YN , HNDST_ORD_YN , HNDST_INVTR_YN , TAXBILL_YN , CLOSE_YN , KT_ORG_ID , HGHR_ORGN_CD , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT A.ORGN_ID , #{APPL_END_DT} , 1 , '20141101' , A.ORGN_STAT_CD , A.TYPE_DTL_CD1 AS AGNCY_TYPE_CD , A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 AS AGNCY_TYPE_DTL_CD , A.TYPE_DTL_CD3 AS CHNL_DTL_CD , A.TYPE_DTL_CD AS MVNO_ORGN_YN , DECODE(A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN, '0', 'N', NVL(A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN, 'N')) AS OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN , DECODE(A.CMSN_PRVD_YN, '0', 'N', NVL(A.CMSN_PRVD_YN, 'N')) AS CMSN_PRVD_YN , DECODE(A.HNDST_ORD_YN, '0', 'N', NVL(A.HNDST_ORD_YN, 'N')) AS HNDST_ORD_YN , DECODE(A.HNDST_INVTR_YN, '0', 'N', NVL(A.HNDST_INVTR_YN, 'N')) AS HNDST_INVTR_YN , DECODE(A.TAXBILL_YN, '0', 'N', NVL(A.TAXBILL_YN, 'N')) AS TAXBILL_YN , DECODE(A.CLOSE_YN, '0', 'N', NVL(A.CLOSE_YN, 'N')) AS CLOSE_YN , A.KT_ORG_ID , A.HGHR_ORGN_CD , #{USER_ID} , SYSDATE , #{USER_ID} , SYSDATE FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_HST A , ( SELECT DECODE(MAX(HST_SEQ) - 1, 0, 1, MAX(HST_SEQ) - 1) AS HST_SEQ FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_HST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{ORGN_ID} ) B WHERE A.ORGN_ID = #{ORGN_ID} AND A.HST_SEQ = B.HST_SEQ
mapper.select: /* orgMgmtMapper.getUsrOrgId */ SELECT ORGN_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{sessionUserId}
SELECT /* orgMgmtMapper.selectMnfctList */ CD_VAL AS value, CD_DSC AS text FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0019' AND USG_YN = 'Y'
SELECT /* orgMgmtMapper.selectOrgnTypeDtl */ CD_VAL AS VALUE, CD_DSC AS TEXT FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = #{orgnType} AND USG_YN = 'Y'
SELECT /* orgMgmtMapper.selectOrgnTypeDtlCd */ DISTINCT GRP_ID FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = #{orgnType} AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND ETC2 IS NOT NULL
SELECT /* orgMgmtMapper.selectOrgnTypeChg */ DISTINCT GRP_ID FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE ETC1 = #{orgnType} AND USG_YN = 'Y'
